swiftpay.name: Swiftpay
swiftpay.description: Single-page React (Vite) fintech prototype. Source of truth is the filesystem paths below.

notes.importmap: Tailwind and fonts load from CDNs in index.html. React, lucide-react, recharts, and @google/genai are bundled by Vite from node_modules (browser import maps conflict with Vite’s module graph; a reference comment is in index.html).
notes.env: Create .env with VITE_API_KEY=your_gemini_key (injected as process.env.API_KEY at build time via vite.config.ts).
